working_on: Routine task AUDIT-EPI (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Epistemology subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35%-density edge sample (k=25 of N=72) plus an edge-anchored node sample (~12 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/epistemology.md.
outcome_summary: Routine session S-0105 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-EPI landed a 25-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/epistemology.md (321 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 22 sound (88.0%), 2 defensible (E-2 expertise→epistemic_dependence, E-20 bayesian_epistemology→dutch_book_argument), 1 reversed (E-13 problem_of_induction→pyrrhonian_skepticism — Pyrrhonist tradition predates Hume's induction problem by ~2000 years; canonical SEP framing runs the other way). Node-verdict tally: 11 sound, 1 granularity-mismatch (N-8 bayesian_epistemology — sub-discipline / framework label borderline with concept-level granularity per ADR 0008). Substantive defects: 2 of 37 sampled elements (5.4%) — well below cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104) and consistent with the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges (textbook-shaped clusters within a single SEP-coherent area) run cleaner than cross-domain bridges. Mid-sample expansion trigger nowhere near firing; standard 35% density held. Cross-cutting observation surfaced for closeout: defensible-but-not-canonical edges cluster around frameworks-vs-motivations dialectical orderings — closeout may consider whether the pattern accumulates as a graph-wide structural choice across subdomains. No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class surfaced; the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104's `cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary` candidate were not extended (within-epistemology data did not corroborate the cross-bridge-specific pattern). Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 72 within-epistemology edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed, confirmed). 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns hold at expected baseline 371 = 366 Phase-5 carryover + 4 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit). AUDIT-EPI criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-ETH (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied; ethics subdomain, 24 of 68 edges at 35% density).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/epistemology.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 25-edge sample plus ~12-node sample drawn from the within-epistemology graph — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element. No other tracked files modified.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-EPI fully delivered: 25-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review landed in epistemology.md (321 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session.
